selections.name: Kayleen's Profit (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent form with a solid 2nd last start over this track and distance. Well weighted to perform and draws a good inside barrier.

selections.name: Misterkipchoge (NZ)
selections.reason: Class dropper who ran a good 3rd last start. The 65kg top weight is a slight concern but has the class edge to overcome it.

selections.name: Cash Artist
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd last start at this track. Third-up today and has won third-up previously, indicating peak fitness.

selections.name: Jetpack Verdi (NZ)
selections.reason: Last start winner who is holding form well. Steps up in distance but can measure up in this field.

danger_horse.name: Misterkipchoge (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Significant class advantage dropping from BM65, highly capable if he handles the weight penalty.

selections.name: Frosty's Gotcha
selections.reason: Made good ground from midfield to finish 2nd at this track last start. Ready to break through in a weak maiden.

selections.name: Arancia
selections.reason: Racing well recently with a solid 3rd at Bowen last start. Has the race experience to feature here.

selections.name: Exodas
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell. Trial form is okay and draws the inside barrier to get a soft run.

selections.name: Lively Spirit
selections.reason: First starter by Spirit Of Boom who won a recent trial. Can show up on debut.

danger_horse.name: Lively Spirit
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed first starter with winning trial form, could easily upset the raced brigade.

selections.name: Diante
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and led before fading to 3rd. Will be fitter for the run and gets the inside barrier advantage.

selections.name: Octopolis
selections.reason: Showed improvement to finish 2nd in a recent trial. Can run a bold race fresh.

selections.name: Big Barry
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Finished 3rd in a recent trial and is capable of a better return.

selections.name: Blessed Boom
selections.reason: Has had two starts and gets blinkers on today which could sharpen her up significantly.

danger_horse.name: Octopolis
danger_horse.reason: Trial improvement suggests she is ready to run a big race on return.

selections.name: Proviseur (NZ)
selections.reason: Ran on strongly from last on the turn for 4th last start. Draws the inside barrier and looks ready to peak.

selections.name: Stellar Legend
selections.reason: Recent form is very sound including a close 2nd last start. Consistent and will be in the finish.

selections.name: Sumich
selections.reason: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Should be at peak fitness now and can get into the money.

selections.name: Notforthemoney
selections.reason: Forgive last start; previous 3rd at this track was solid. Can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Stellar Legend
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent maiden who is knocking on the door for a win.

selections.name: Track Tale
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has an excellent fresh record and won a recent trial. Class runner of the field.

selections.name: Early Fusion
selections.reason: First-up specialist who has placed previously when fresh. Draws well and will be highly competitive.

selections.name: Dealing's Done
selections.reason: Won well at this track last start. Racing in great form and drops in weight.

selections.name: Obligated
selections.reason: Drops in class after tackling Quality grade last start. Capable of a strong showing in this company.

danger_horse.name: Early Fusion
danger_horse.reason: Lethal fresh record makes him a massive threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Zaya
selections.reason: Won by a neck at this track last start. Well placed here and will be fitter third-up.

selections.name: Spirit Of Mac
selections.reason: Raced on the speed and won last start. Top jockey Ryan Wiggins takes the ride.

selections.name: He's The One
selections.reason: Resuming from a break but has placed fresh previously. Draws the inside rail for a soft run.

selections.name: Ravenite
selections.reason: Resumes after six months but has a good fresh record. Inside draw is a plus.

danger_horse.name: Spirit Of Mac
danger_horse.reason: Last start winner with a significant jockey upgrade.

selections.name: Kickatinalong
selections.reason: Drops in class after running in stronger company at Gold Coast and Doomben. Suited to this grade.

selections.name: Answering
selections.reason: Consistent performer who boxed on steadily for 2nd two starts back at this track. Right in this.

selections.name: Upstart Legend
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd at this track last start. Draws the inside barrier and will be prominent.

selections.name: Better Be Ready
selections.reason: Faded last start but previous form was solid. Can bounce back with a better run.

danger_horse.name: Answering
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent at this level and track, always a threat in BM60 grade.

selections.name: Diasonic
selections.reason: Recent form is very sound, culminating in a win at this track last start. Confidence is high.

selections.name: Boom Crusher
selections.reason: Raced on speed and held on for 3rd at this track last start. Expected to go close again.

selections.name: Mordecai
selections.reason: Third-up today and has won third-up in the past. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Gregarious
selections.reason: Drops in class and draws the inside rail. Can improve sharply in this easier grade.

danger_horse.name: Boom Crusher
danger_horse.reason: Strong on-pace runner who will be hard to catch if he gets his own way in front.
